title_zh: 地球物理学硕士研究生
school_en: Southern University of Science and Technology
edu_intro_zh: 围绕地球物理方向的系统学习路径。
edu_intro_en: Systematic academic training focused on geophysics.
edu1_en: Southern University of Science and Technology
res1_zh: 基于高密度电法的人体组织成像
res1_en: Human Tissue Imaging with High-Density Electrical Methods
res1_desc_zh: 通过在皮肤上部署高密度电极阵列，并采用偶极-偶极激励的有限差分正向建模，利用组织间生物电阻抗差异，实现高分辨率区分，并通过时空电阻率变化量化区域和全身含水量。
res1_desc_en: Built high-density electrode arrays with dipole-dipole finite-difference forward modeling to distinguish tissues using bio-impedance contrasts and quantify regional/full-body hydration changes.
res2_desc_zh: 将细石英砂在高压下压实模拟海底沉积物，孔隙充满天然气；利用天然气和盐水饱和砂之间的电阻率差异，反演得到高分辨率海底天然气分布图。
res2_desc_en: Compacted fine quartz sand under high pressure to simulate seabed sediments and inverted high-resolution gas distribution maps using resistivity contrasts between gas and brine saturation.
res3_zh: 基于集群机的MT实时动态监测系统建设与软件开发
res3_en: MT Real-Time Dynamic Monitoring System on Linux Cluster
res3_desc_zh: 建立实时现场大地电磁监测平台，数据通过4G网络传输到Linux集群进行存储和实时处理；基于PyQt和Python实现实时大地电磁数据远程可视化与即时分析。
res3_desc_en: Built a real-time MT monitoring platform with 4G transmission to Linux clusters for storage/processing, and developed PyQt/Python software for remote visualization and instant analysis.
res4_zh: 基于井震资料地电模型建模与软件实现
res4_en: Geoelectric Modeling from Seismic and Well-Logging Data
res4_desc_zh: 读取并转换地震与测井数据为地形结构，在COMSOL中构建分层模型并分配电阻率后完成有限元正演建模；开发基于PyQt的界面用于高效数据处理与可视化。
res4_desc_en: Converted seismic and logging data into terrain structures, built layered COMSOL models with resistivity assignments for FEM forward modeling, and developed a PyQt UI for efficient processing and visualization.

skills.desc_zh: 熟练掌握数据处理，能够独立完成项目代码编写。
skills.desc_en: Proficient in data processing and able to independently deliver project code.

skills.title_zh: 地球物理数据处理与建模
skills.desc_zh: 具备有限差分与有限元建模经验，熟悉 COMSOL、PyQt 及实时监测系统流程。
skills.desc_en: Hands-on experience with FDM/FEM modeling, COMSOL, PyQt, and real-time monitoring pipelines.

skills.desc_zh: 作为学校主力球员，获得多项省级奖项。
skills.desc_en: Core team player with multiple provincial-level awards.

publications.title_zh: 基于高密度电法的人体组织成像（已录用）
publications.title_en: Human Tissue Imaging with High-Density Electrical Methods (Accepted)
publications.desc_zh: 作者：李林峰、宋真龙、何展翔、杨迪琨。
publications.desc_en: Authors: Linfeng Li, Zhenlong Song, Zhanxiang He, Dikun Yang.
